popularStory.description:
CHICHESTER FAMILY

July 18, 2016

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Chichester於1424年2月23日出生在英國戴文皮爾頓時，他的父親Sir John Chichester39歲，母親Alice Wotton22歲。他於大約1444年與Margaret Keynes結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1496年12月25日在英國戴文法爾享年72歲，埋葬在英國戴文皮爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Chichester于1424年2月23日出生在英国戴文皮爾頓时，他的父亲Sir John Chichester39岁，母亲Alice Wotton22岁。他于大约1444年与Margaret Keynes结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1496年12月25日在英国戴文法爾享年72岁，埋葬在英国戴文皮爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Chichester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Chichester in Sussex, probably named with the Old English personal name Cissa + Old English ceaster ‘Roman fort’. (Cissa is attested as the name of a historical person; it is of uncertain etymology.) Alternatively, the first element may be an Old English word cisse ‘gravelly feature’.

variants.name: Chidester
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Chichester  . It is not found in English records.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Chichester was born on 23 February 1424, in Pilton, Devon, England, his father, Sir John Chichester, was 39 and his mother, Alice Wotton, was 22. He married Margaret Keynes about 1444. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 25 December 1496, in Farleigh, Devon, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Pilton, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Chichester est né le 23 février 1424, à Pilton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Chichester, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alice Wotton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Keynes environ 1444. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1496, à Farleigh, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Pilton, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Chichester am 23. Februar 1424 in Pilton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Chichester 39 und seine Mutter Alice Wotton 22. Er hat um 1444 Margaret Keynes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1496 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Farleigh, Devon, England und wurde in Pilton, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Chichester è nato il il 23 febbraio 1424 nel Pilton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir John Chichester, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Alice Wotton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Keynes circa 1444. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 25 dicembre 1496, nel Farleigh, Devon, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Pilton, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Chichesterが1424年2月23日にイギリスデボンピルトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Chichesterは39歳，母Alice Wottonは22歳であった。約1444年にMargaret Keynesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1496年12月25日にイギリスデボンファルレイグで72歳で死去し，イギリスデボンピルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Chichester(이)가 1424년 2월 23일 영국 데폰 피턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Chichester(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Wotton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1444년 Margaret Keynes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1496년 12월 25일 영국 데폰 패를리에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 피턴에 묻혔다.

pt.23 February 1424–25 December 1496: 23 de fevereiro de 1424–25 de dezembro de 1496
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Chichester nasceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1424, em Pilton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Chichester, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alice Wotton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Keynes aproximadamente 1444. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1496, em Farleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Pilton, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Chichester родился 23 февраля 1424 г. в местности пилтон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Chichester было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Wotton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Keynes около 1444 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 25 декабря 1496 г. в местности фарлиг, девон, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности пилтон, девон, Англия.

es.23 February 1424–25 December 1496: 23 de febrero de 1424–25 de diciembre de 1496
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Chichester nació el 23 de febrero de 1424, en Pilton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Chichester, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Alice Wotton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Keynes aproximadamente 1444. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1496, en Farleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Pilton, Devon, Inglaterra.
